title: NormalASM
body:
# This mod is a rebranded fork of [CensoredASM / LoliASM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lolasm) by Rongmario. Nothing has been done except rebrand.

As of version 5+, this mod is now explicitly incompatible with VanillaFix and TexFix as their functionalities have been improved upon and added to the mod.

What this mod does:

1. Optimize RAM usage. Here's what happens when you add it to a large modpack (without Foamfix):

 ![](https://i.imgur.com/WEDsU0B.png)

2. Fixes crashes, within different mods, and Forge itself.

3. Optimizes code in general.

 

As of 2.3, requires [MixinBooter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-booter).

 

Recommend using Foamfix along with this.
